theme: stagehands assigning actors to shared dressing rooms
seed_problem: direct-mapped cache page-to-set coloring to minimize trace misses
mutation: composite: fixed per-actor room (color) assignment replayed against an LRU-capacity-K trace, where conflict cost is driven by temporal alternation between actors rather than static pairwise co-occurrence or raw access frequency
title: Quick-Change Dressing Rooms
strategies: address-modulo / round-robin room assignment (the checker's own baseline)
frequency-first load balancing: sort actors by total cue count, bin-pack into rooms by running load (ignores WHEN actors are cued relative to each other)

alternation-graph mining + capacity-aware coloring + local search: build a weighted graph from consecutive-cue transitions, greedily color by descending edge weight respecting K, then refine with randomized recolor moves scored by re-simulating the actual slow-change count
